validation_queries.description: Check that we have some kernel summary entries
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM kernel_summary

validation_queries.description: Check for any OpenMP offloading kernels
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM kernel_summary WHERE name LIKE '%__omp_offloading%'
validation_queries.error_message: No OpenMP offloading kernels found in kernel_summary table

validation_queries.description: Check for kernels with valid call counts
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM kernel_summary WHERE calls > 0
validation_queries.error_message: No kernels found with valid call counts

validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM kernel_summary WHERE name LIKE '%vmul%' OR name LIKE '%mul%'

validation_queries.description: Check for OpenMP OMPT instrumentation regions
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM regions WHERE name LIKE '%openmp%' AND (name LIKE '%ompt%' OR name LIKE '%callback%')
validation_queries.error_message: No OpenMP OMPT instrumentation regions found

validation_queries.description: Check for rocprofsys OMPT component activity
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM regions WHERE name LIKE '%rocprofsys%' AND name LIKE '%ompt%'
validation_queries.error_message: No rocprofsys OMPT component activity found in regions

validation_queries.description: Check for OpenMP OMPT wrapper components
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM rocpd_string WHERE string LIKE '%tim::openmp::ompt_wrapper%'
validation_queries.error_message: No OpenMP OMPT wrapper components found

validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM rocpd_string WHERE string LIKE '%callback_connector%' AND string LIKE '%component_tuple%'
SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM rocpd_string WHERE string LIKE '%rocprofsys::component::ompt%'

validation_queries.description: Check for target data operation types
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM rocpd_string WHERE string LIKE '%ompt_target_data_op_t%'
validation_queries.error_message: No OpenMP target data operation types found

validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM rocpd_region WHERE name_id = 103
validation_queries.error_message: No name_id 103 entries found - specific OpenMP region not captured

validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM rocpd_region WHERE name_id = 104
validation_queries.error_message: No name_id 104 entries found - specific OpenMP region not captured

validation_queries.description: Check for valid durations in target regions
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM rocpd_region WHERE name_id IN (103, 104) AND (end - start) > 0
validation_queries.error_message: Found target regions (103, 104) but with invalid durations
